_comment: Tumbling Window Trigger — fires daily at 06:00 UTC.
Passes windowStartTime as ingestDate to the pipeline.
Supports backfill: if a window is missed, ADF re-runs it automatically.
To activate: ADF Studio → Author → Triggers → Import, then click Publish + Activate.
To backfill a specific date: trigger a manual run with ingestDate = YYYY-MM-DD.
name: DailyBronzeIngestTrigger

properties.description: Daily SEC EDGAR Bronze CDC ingest at 06:00 UTC. Passes windowStartTime as ingestDate with fullRefresh=false.
